arts.ttl: Man City winner at Wolves a 'grey area' - but what are the rules?
arts.sum: What was the fall-out of John Stones' late winner for Manchester City against Wolves, with the goal given following a VAR check after initially being ruled out.

arts.ttl: Gary O’Neil: Big clubs like Man City more likely to get decisions than Wolves
arts.sum: Wolves were on the end of another dramatic VAR decision after John Stones’ last-gasp header was allowed to stand at Molineux, giving City a 2-1 win.

arts.ttl: 'No consistency': Gabriel Agbonlahor says Wolves player should have been sent off in 2-1 defeat vs Man City
Man United & Man City could be set for major battle in the months ahead
arts.sum: Sporting Lisbon manager Ruben Amorim is reportedly in the sights of both Manchester United and Manchester City for the months ahead amid some doubts over both Erik ten Hag and Pep Guardiola. Ten Hag is struggling at Man Utd and his position may not be entirely safe, while Guardiola is a legend at Man City […] The post Man United & Man City could be set for major battle in the months ahead appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Gary O'Neil confirms Howard Webb talks after Man City controversy denies Wolves
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers were seconds away from their second Premier League point of the season, only for Manchester City to break their hearts with a controversial late winner

arts.ttl: Journalist Blown Away by 8/10 Wolves Star for Man City Display
arts.sum: Despite the loss, Wolves defended bravely, limiting the Premier League's top goal-scorer, Erling Haaland, to zero shots.

arts.ttl: Wolves defeat a big blow- O'Neil
arts.sum: Wolves boss Gary O'Neil praises his side's "excellent" performance despite their 2-1 loss to Manchester City after John Stones' controversial stoppage-time winner in the Premier League at Molineux.

arts.ttl: Man City aren't used to winning games late - Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says they are not used to "winning so late" after a narrow 2-1 victory against Wolverhampton Wanderers secured by a John Stones header deep into added time.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola confirms double Man City injury blow for Champions League tie
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about Kyle Walker and Kevin De Bruyne after the Premier League win over Wolves

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola responds after Premier League statement on Man City controversy
arts.sum: John Stones scored a 95th minute winner at Molineux as the Premier League champions came from behind to claim a 2-1 victory over Wolves, with VAR intervening at the death to give them all three points
